$schema: Acceptance Criteria for PR #4: Station Layer POC

pr.title: feat: Station layer POC — separate entity for disaster relief POIs

devServer.note: Must be on branch feat/station-layer-poc which includes PR #2 changes.

happyPaths.name: Station markers render on map
steps: Navigate to http://localhost:3456
Wait for map to load
Observe that there are TWO visual types of markers on the map
happyPaths.expected: Round markers (tasks) AND rounded-square markers (stations) both visible. Station markers have amber/warm tint background. Task markers have white background. Station markers are slightly smaller (36px vs 40px).
happyPaths.verification: Both marker shapes are present on the map. Station markers use rounded-xl (iOS icon style), not rounded-full.

happyPaths.name: Station layer toggle in layer menu
steps: Click the layers icon (bottom-right of map)
Look for '救災據點' in the layer toggle list
Verify it has a toggle switch and is ON by default
happyPaths.expected: '救災據點' appears as the FIRST item in the layer toggles section. Toggle switch is in the ON position (blue).
happyPaths.verification: '救災據點' text visible in layer menu. Toggle is active/blue.

happyPaths.name: Toggle station layer OFF hides station markers
steps: Open layer menu
Click '救災據點' toggle to turn it OFF
Observe the map
happyPaths.expected: All rounded-square (station) markers disappear from the map. Round (task) markers remain visible.
happyPaths.verification: Only round task markers remain on map after toggle OFF.

happyPaths.name: Toggle station layer ON restores station markers
steps: With station layer OFF from SL-03, click '救災據點' toggle again to turn ON
Observe the map
happyPaths.expected: Rounded-square station markers reappear on the map alongside task markers.

happyPaths.name: Click station marker opens StationDetailCard
steps: Zoom into the map until individual station markers (rounded-square) appear
Click on a rounded-square station marker
Observe the detail card that appears
happyPaths.expected: StationDetailCard slides in with amber-tinted header. Shows: station name, type label with emoji (e.g. '🚿 洗澡站', '🚻 廁所', '🏥 醫療站'), status badge (開放中/已關閉), address, and optionally contact info and resources.
happyPaths.verification: Card header has amber tint (not white like task card). Type emoji is from station set (🚿🚻🏥📦🏠🏨💧🔧), NOT task set (🔥🚨🚧👥⛑️🚑🪏🚜🔧💪🛵).

happyPaths.name: StationDetailCard shows station-specific fields
steps: With a StationDetailCard open (from SL-05), inspect the content sections
happyPaths.expected: Card shows: (1) Address section with coordinates, (2) Status indicator (開放中 with green dot or 已關閉 with red dot). May also show: contact info, operating hours, resources list, notes. Card does NOT show: urgency badge, history timeline, feedback counts, '我能前往協助' button — those are task-only concepts.
happyPaths.verification: No urgency badge (緊急/中等/一般) visible. No history timeline. Status uses colored dot indicator.

happyPaths.name: Mutual exclusion: clicking task closes station card
steps: Click a station marker to open StationDetailCard
Then click a task marker (round shape) on the map
happyPaths.expected: StationDetailCard closes. TaskDetailCard opens instead. Only one detail card visible at a time.
happyPaths.verification: After clicking task, station card is gone. Task card is visible.

happyPaths.name: Mutual exclusion: clicking station closes task card
steps: Click a task marker to open TaskDetailCard
Then click a station marker (rounded-square shape) on the map
happyPaths.expected: TaskDetailCard closes. StationDetailCard opens instead. Only one detail card visible at a time.
happyPaths.verification: After clicking station, task card is gone. Station card is visible.

happyPaths.name: Close StationDetailCard via X button
steps: With StationDetailCard open, click the X (close) button in the top-right of the card
happyPaths.expected: StationDetailCard closes. Map returns to normal state with no card visible.
happyPaths.verification: No detail card visible after clicking X.

happyPaths.name: Station clusters expand on click
steps: At a zoom level where station markers cluster (zoomed out)
Click on a station cluster bubble (rounded-square with number)
happyPaths.expected: Map zooms in to expand the cluster, showing individual station markers.
happyPaths.verification: Zoom level increases after clicking cluster. More individual markers visible.

happyPaths.name: Fit-all button includes stations
steps: Ensure station layer is ON
Click the fit-all button (Maximize2 icon, bottom-right controls)
Observe the map bounds
happyPaths.expected: Map adjusts to show ALL markers (both tasks and stations). If stations are spread wider than tasks, the view should be wider than task-only bounds.
happyPaths.verification: Map bounds change after clicking. Both task and station markers are within visible area.

happyPaths.name: Station resources render in detail card
steps: Find and click a station that has resources (e.g. a restroom station — '廁所' type often has resources like '流動廁所(無障礙)')
Look for the resources section in StationDetailCard
happyPaths.expected: Resources section shows a list with resource name, amount, and unit (e.g. '流動廁所(無障礙) — 2 座').
happyPaths.verification: At least one resource item rendered with name and quantity.
